item.title: Connecticut Crab Company LLC: Crab Cakes various sizes sold to food service Recall
item.product: Crab Cakes various sizes sold to food service
item.summary: May be temperature abused, which may result in growth of Clostridium botulinum Product details: Crab Cakes various sizes sold to food service
item.remedy: Affected quantity: 39 boxes or approximately 175lbs of crab cakes
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
